summary: Re-tested the CantFindOnline.saveUrl fix from iteration 2. All three review-request criteria pass: (1) network traffic after Save shows ONLY a single PATCH /api/books/{id}/source-url with NO subsequent POST to /api/books/{id}/refresh; (2) Retry FicHub button (data-testid retry-<book_id>) remains visible and clickable on the row; (3) success toast reads exactly 'Source URL updated. Click Retry FicHub to try again.' — the old 'trying FicHub…' wording is gone. Bug from iteration 2 is fully resolved.
critical_code_review_comments: saveUrl() in /app/frontend/src/pages/CantFindOnline.jsx (lines 77-86) is now clean: PATCH + toast + close editor. No silent auto-retry. Matches the reviewer's intent.
test_credentials: Seeded fresh user via POST /api/auth/register (test_cfo_<rand>@example.com / hunter2pw) and one MongoDB book document with fichub_unavailable=true. Both deleted after test.
seed_data_creation: Inserted one book {book_id: book_test_b8fd82cf, user_id: user_5d0c8e880a10, fichub_unavailable: true, source_url: https://example.invalid/story/1} for the test user. Cleaned up (book + session + user removed from Mongo).
context_for_next_testing_agent: CantFindOnline saveUrl fix verified end-to-end via Playwright with network interception and session-cookie injection. To re-test: register a user, insert a books document with fichub_unavailable=true via Mongo, set session_token cookie in the browser, visit /library/cant-find-online, click 'Fix URL' on the row, type a new URL, click 'Save', and assert (a) only one PATCH /api/books/{id}/source-url request is fired, (b) retry-<book_id> button is still visible, (c) toast text is exactly 'Source URL updated. Click Retry FicHub to try again.'
rca_of_the_issue: Iteration 2 had `await retry(bid, { silent: true });` inside saveUrl() which auto-fired the FicHub refresh after URL correction. Main agent removed that line and updated the toast copy from 'Source URL updated — trying FicHub…' to 'Source URL updated. Click Retry FicHub to try again.' Verified the current saveUrl() at lines 77-86 only calls api.patch + toast.success + clears editing state — no retry invocation. Network capture during the Save click confirmed zero /refresh requests.
